      "question": "Consider a parallelized for loop with 4 threads, where the loop iterates over an array of 12 elements. Which iterations will be executed by thread 1?",
      "options": ["A) 1, 2, 3, 4", "B) 2, 3, 4, 5", "C) 3, 4, 5, 6", "D) 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "In a parallelized for loop, each thread will execute a subset of iterations. In this case, thread 1 will execute iterations 1, 2, 3, and 4, since the loop iterates over
